title: acranthera strigosa
intro: Acranthera strigosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Borneo. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Acranthera strigosa include its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Acranthera strigosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping its leaves or roots in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures.
